headline: Blackstone Faces BCRED Liquidity Test While Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Blackstone’s flagship private credit fund, BCRED, has received record redemption requests, testing investor confidence in the vehicle. To meet the elevated withdrawal demand, Blackstone and senior executives injected $400 million into BCRED and raised its share repurchase cap. The moves come as questions grow around liquidity in private credit funds and how they respond to changing market and technological trends. For investors watching NYSE:BX, this fund-level pressure lands after a tough...
